name: Brainrot: Animal Quizzes
short_description: Brainrot: Animal Quiz is an exciting puzzle game in which you and your friends will have to guess the popular animals from the Italian meme.
detailed_description:
Description 

Brainrot: Animal Quizzes is not just a game, but a true immersion into a mysterious world where the mythology of Italy comes to life in the bizarre forms of chimeras! Uncover the secrets of ancient creatures, whose images are crafted from legends, historical riddles, and fantastical interpretations. A vast universe awaits — where every quiz becomes a key to unraveling centuries-old mysteries.

Gameplay

Choose from a variety of thrilling modes:

Race Against Time — Challenge friends in adrenaline-fueled duels where every second counts, and mistakes lead to costly missteps!

Expert Challenge — Test your knowledge by identifying chimeras through intricate patterns on their hides, the curve of their claws, and the glint in their eyes.

Linguistic Analysis — Decipher the ancients’ cryptic language: dissect the names of creatures to decode their essence and weaknesses.

Features

What makes the game unique?

Dynamic Bestiary — Collect creatures to populate it with vivid descriptions and illustrations. The more you discover, the richer its lore becomes!

Achievements with Character — Earn titles by identifying all chimeras of a type or dominating competitions.

Community & Mythcrafting — Shape the evolving lore of chimeras! Design your own fantastical creatures, and you might even encounter them in future updates.

Are you ready to face creatures that defy existence? Download Brainrot: Animal Quizzes — where your mind becomes the boundary between humanity’s realm and the domain of chimeras!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Japanese
